title: Set of 2 Round Glass Ashtrays for Inside or Outside | 2 x 10.5 cm Ash Trays Indoors | Ash trays Outdoors for Home, Garden, Bar or Pub
features: Chunky and Crystal-Clear - these Glass Ashtrays for Cigarettes have a sleek and sophisticated look, making them a stylish addition indoors or outdoors. A cool ashtray option for you or your guests to enjoy a cigarette
No Lingering Smells - With their impermeable glass surfaces and solid construction, once emptied and cleaned your sparkling ashtrays hold no nasty odours
Solid and Stable - The substantial weight and stable design of our indoor and outdoor ashtray ensures they remain right where you place them, even when they are being used as ashtrays for outside

Easy to Clean - Cleaning up is a breeze with this ash tray. The smooth, stain-resistant glass ashtray is easy and quick to clean – it’s fine to put the ash tray inside a dishwasher or wipe clean with a damp cloth or wipes

Versatile and Practical - Whether you're having a few friends round or throwing party, these stackable ash trays are easy to put out and store away as needed. They are ideal ashtrays for inside the home and for ash trays outdoors in the garden, pub or bar
description: Chunky Glass Ashtrays for inside or outside, round, 10.5cm diameter, 3.6cm high
